title: Data Mining & Scraping
description:
Job Description:
I am looking for a freelancer to extract (scrape) data from specific websites.
Scope of Work:
•	Extract data from 1–3 provided websites/directories
•	Compile the data into a clean, structured Excel spreadsheet
•	Ensure accuracy and remove duplicates
Data Fields Needed:
•	Building Name
•	Building Address
•	Management Company Name
•	Phone Number
•	Email (if available)
•	Website (if available)
Requirements:
•	Experience with web scraping / data extraction tools
•	Ability to handle structured and semi-structured websites
•	Deliver clean, well-organized Excel output
•	Deduplicate and format data properly
Deliverable:
•	Excel or Google Sheet with all extracted data
•	Clean formatting (one record per row, no duplicates)

title: Full-Stack Developer — Next.js + Supabase + Claude AI Build
description:
Build the AI platform horsemen actually need.

We're launching an AI-powered overnight horse stabling search and trip planning platform for the western equestrian travel market. A horseman tells Claude what they need ("Texas to Wyoming, stops every five hours, four horses, large rig"), our route planner builds a multi-day itinerary, and they call facilities directly. No booking layer, no middleman. Ask → Extract → Plan → Call.

Domain owned. Brand locked. Seed database (1,600–2,700 facilities) supplied — no scraping. Complete 71-page technical specification ready to send.

Solo developers only. No agencies, no dev shops, no team fronts. One developer reads the spec, writes the code, owns the outcome. Agency or team-based proposals will be skipped.

Phase 1 scope:

AI search via Claude API with structured tool use
PostGIS spatial database, four facility types
Mapbox map with custom pins, route overlays, fuel station layer
Multi-day route planner with day-by-day cascade UI
Host claim flow + verified host dashboard
Top Hand membership - Stripe Billing
Trip save, share, export (printable PDF + digital itinerary)
SEO content engine (Sanity CMS, blog, programmatic state guides)
Newsletter automation (beehiiv, four acquisition channels)
Analytics (GA4 with 18 custom events)

Sprint 1 Week 1 ships a Coming Soon homepage and live blog at the production domain — SEO authority accumulating from day one.

Tech stack: Next.js (App Router) · Tailwind · Supabase (Postgres + PostGIS) · Mapbox GL JS · Anthropic Claude · NextAuth.js · Stripe Billing · Resend · Sanity CMS · beehiiv · Vercel · GA4

What we provide:

71-page technical spec — data model, API routes, integration patterns, code samples, env vars, pre-launch checklist. Sent after first conversation.

All seed and facility data, structured and import-ready
Locked branding (logo, palette, typography, design tokens)
All product, pricing, and copy decisions finalized
Direct async access to the founder and Domain expertise 

Who we're looking for:

A senior solo developer who's shipped consumer products in this stack. Independent, honest about hours and risks, communicative, quality-minded. Not the cheapest bid — the one who builds products that ship and work. To repeat: no agencies, no team fronts, no subcontracting.

Required experience:

3+ years Next.js (App Router preferred)
Production Supabase or Postgres + PostGIS
LLM API in production (Claude, OpenAI, or comparable) — not just prototypes
Stripe Billing for SaaS subscriptions including webhooks
Mapbox GL JS or comparable
Sanity Headless CMS
Strong English written communication

Nice to have: Tailwind + shadcn/ui · SEO and Core Web Vitals · beehiiv API · consumer travel/marketplace background
How to apply:

Brief intro (3–5 sentences) — who you are, why this project, and confirm you're a solo independent (not agency, team front, or subcontracting).

Two production examples with live URLs — your personal work in this stack. Code you wrote, not code your team wrote.

Your hourly rate in USD.

Initial reaction to scope — full spec sent after we connect.

Templated, AI-generated, or generic proposals will be skipped — and so will agencies posing as individuals. We read every proposal carefully; we'd rather have ten thoughtful responses than a hundred copy-paste pitches.

title: Data Scraper Needed to Create Cold Call Sales List

title: B2B Lead Generation Specialist for California Engineering Firm
description:
We are a multi-discipline civil, structural, and MEP engineering firm based in California. We're hiring a full-time lead generation specialist to run outbound campaigns targeting architects, developers, and general contractors in California.
Responsibilities:

Build and maintain target lists using Apollo.io and LinkedIn Sales Navigator
Set up and manage cold email infrastructure (Instantly or Smartlead)
Write and test email sequences and LinkedIn messages
Manage replies and book qualified discovery calls onto our calendar
Provide weekly reporting on KPIs

Requirements:

2+ years running B2B cold email campaigns
Experience with Instantly, Smartlead, Apollo, Clay, or similar tools
Strong written English
Available to overlap at least 4 hours with Pacific Time

Bonus: Experience working with AEC, construction, real estate, or professional services firms.
To apply, send: (1) examples of campaigns you've run with results, (2) one sample cold email targeting a multifamily developer, (3) your monthly rate for full-time work.

title: Senior Data Engineer / Scraping Expert – Build Scalable Unclaimed Funds Intelligence Pipeline (MVP
description:
Senior Data Engineer / Scraping Expert – Build Scalable Unclaimed Funds Intelligence Pipeline (MVP → Production)

---

**Overview (Read Carefully):**
We are building a **data intelligence system** focused on identifying and prioritizing high-value unclaimed funds across California and multi-state public datasets.

This is **not a basic scraping job**.
We are looking for a **senior-level engineer** who can architect, build, and deliver a **clean, scalable MVP** that can evolve into a production-grade pipeline.

If you only copy/paste scripts or build fragile scrapers, this is not the project.

---

**Objective:**
Design and deploy a working system that:

* Collects data from multiple public record sources
* Normalizes and deduplicates messy datasets
* Scores and ranks high-value opportunities
* Outputs structured, actionable leads into a CRM

---

# 🔧 Scope of Work (MVP)

## 1. Data Ingestion Layer (Critical)

Build robust ingestion pipelines for:

* California unclaimed property (search-based or bulk where available)
* County-level unclaimed checks (LA County or similar)
* Federal court unclaimed funds (nice to have)

Requirements:

* Handle pagination and large result sets
* Work with dynamic/JS-rendered pages
* Design for reliability (not brittle scraping)

Preferred stack:

* **Python + Playwright (preferred)**
* OR **Apify Actors (if justified)**

---

## 2. Data Architecture / Storage

* Set up **PostgreSQL (or equivalent)**

* Design clean, scalable schema with separation of:

  * raw ingestion
  * normalized data
  * scored leads

* Must support:

  * deduplication
  * filtering
  * future multi-state expansion

---

## 3. Data Cleaning & Entity Resolution (High Importance)

Implement logic to:

* Normalize business names (LLC / INC / variations)
* Standardize addresses
* Remove duplicates across sources
* Classify entity types:

  * individual
  * business
  * estate (if detectable)

Bonus:

* Fuzzy matching / clustering approach (OpenRefine-style logic or programmatic)

---

## 4. Scoring Engine (Core Value Layer)

Design a scoring model that prioritizes records based on:

* Claim amount (primary driver)
* Age of record
* Keywords (estate, deceased, trust, etc.)
* Entity status (active vs dissolved, where feasible)

Output must include:

* Numeric score (0–100)
* Priority classification (high / medium / low)

Code should be clean and easily adjustable.

---

## 5. CRM Integration (Lead Output)

Push qualified leads into:

* **Airtable OR HubSpot**

Each record should include:

* owner name
* amount
* source
* score
* priority
* notes field

---

## 6. Automation & Execution

* Pipeline should be runnable:

  * manually (CLI/script)
  * optionally scheduled (cron or platform-based)

* Provide clear documentation for:

  * running ingestion
  * processing data
  * exporting leads

---

# 📦 Deliverables (Non-Negotiable)

* Fully functional MVP pipeline
* Clean, well-structured source code
* PostgreSQL schema + setup instructions
* Sample dataset (minimum 500–1,000 records)
* At least **20 high-priority scored leads**
* Documentation (step-by-step)
* **Short Loom video walkthrough**

---

# 🧠 Required Skills

* Advanced web scraping (Playwright / Scrapy / Apify)
* Strong Python (data pipelines, parsing, transformations)
* PostgreSQL (schema design + querying)
* Data cleaning / deduplication / entity resolution
* API integrations (Airtable or HubSpot)

---

# ➕ Strong Plus

* Experience with public records or financial datasets
* Handling anti-bot / rate limits responsibly
* OpenRefine or fuzzy matching frameworks
* Designing systems for scale (millions of rows)

---

# ⚠️ Constraints (Important)

* Use **only publicly accessible data**
* No scraping behind logins or restricted systems
* Must follow ethical and legal best practices
* Code must be maintainable (no hacks)

---

# ⏱ Timeline

* MVP expected within **7–14 days**
* Faster delivery is a plus if quality is maintained

---

# 💰 Budget

* Open (fixed or hourly)
* We will pay for **quality and speed**
* Bonus for clean architecture and scalability

---

# 📩 To Apply

Please include:

1. Relevant projects (data pipelines / scraping systems)
2. Your proposed stack (and why)
3. Estimated timeline
4. Any improvements you would make to this design

---

# 🎯 Goal

Build a **reliable, scalable foundation** for a long-term data pipeline business.

---

# 🚀 Ongoing Work

Yes — strong performers will continue into:

* Multi-state expansion
* Automation & scheduling
* Skip-tracing integrations
* Internal dashboard / UI
* Data enrichment layers

---

**We are looking for someone who thinks like a system builder, not just a coder.**

-

title: Build an Intelligent Agentic AI System for Predictive Analytics (USA Real Estate)
description:
Build an Intelligent Agentic AI System for Predictive Analytics (USA Real Estate) &  Property Investment Lead Generation 

---

# Project Overview

We are looking for an experienced AI Engineer / AI Automation Expert / Full-Stack Developer to build an advanced Agentic AI System focused on the USA real estate investment market.

The goal is to create an intelligent AI platform that can:

* Identify profitable real estate investment patterns
* Predict investment opportunities using data analytics
* Capture and qualify leads automatically
* Automate research and workflow processes
* Assist property investment agents with smarter decision-making
* Generate insights from market and customer data

This is a serious long-term project with potential for ongoing work, feature expansion, and maintenance.

---

# Main Objectives

The system should function as an AI-powered investment assistant for property investors and agents.

Core goals include:

1. Property investment opportunity detection
2. Market trend analysis and prediction
3. Lead capture and qualification
4. Intelligent automation workflows
5. AI-driven recommendations
6. CRM and workflow automation
7. Multi-agent AI task orchestration

---

# Scope of Work

## 1. Agentic AI System Development

Build a multi-agent AI architecture capable of autonomous reasoning and task execution.

Possible agents may include:

* Data Collection Agent
* Market Analysis Agent
* Lead Qualification Agent
* Property Scoring Agent
* Workflow Automation Agent
* Communication Agent
* Reporting Agent
* Prediction & Forecasting Agent

The system should support:

* Autonomous workflows
* Memory/context handling
* Tool calling
* Task delegation between agents
* Real-time decision making
* Human-in-the-loop approvals

Preferred frameworks:

* Modern LLM frameworks
* Multi-agent orchestration systems
* AI workflow automation frameworks
* API-based AI integrations
* Context and memory systems

---

## 2. Real Estate Data Collection & Processing

The AI system should collect and process data from multiple sources.

Possible data sources:

* Real estate listing data
* Property market data
* Public records
* Foreclosure data
* Tax records
* Rental market data
* Geographic and location data
* Census and demographic data

Features required:

* Data scraping/API integrations
* Data cleaning and normalization
* Structured database storage
* Real-time updates
* Data enrichment

---

## 3. Pattern Identification & Predictive Analytics

The system must identify investment patterns and generate predictive insights.

Examples:

* High ROI areas
* Emerging neighborhoods
* Distressed properties
* Off-market opportunities
* Rental yield predictions
* Price appreciation forecasting
* Buyer/seller behavior patterns
* Investment risk scoring

AI/ML capabilities:

* Predictive modeling
* Trend forecasting
* Property scoring algorithms
* Classification models
* Recommendation engine
* Opportunity ranking
* Time-series analysis

Preferred stack:

* Python
* Machine learning frameworks
* Data analysis libraries
* SQL / PostgreSQL
* Vector databases

---

## 4. Lead Capture & Automation

Develop intelligent lead generation and capture systems.

Features should include:

* Website lead capture forms
* AI chat assistant
* Automated lead qualification
* CRM integrations
* Pipeline tracking
* Lead scoring system
* Contact enrichment
* Auto-follow-up workflows

---

## 5. Dashboard & Reporting System

Create a modern dashboard for investors and agents.

Dashboard requirements:

* Property analytics dashboard
* Lead management panel
* Investment opportunity alerts
* AI-generated recommendations
* Forecast reports
* KPI tracking
* Heat maps and visualizations
* ROI calculators

Preferred frontend stack:

* React
* Next.js
* Tailwind CSS
* FastAPI / Django

---

## 6. AI Communication Features

The AI should assist with communication workflows.

Examples:

* AI-generated outreach content
* Personalized investor communication
* Lead nurturing workflows
* AI chatbot for property inquiries
* Call summaries and transcription
* Follow-up automation
* Scheduling automation

---

# Technical Requirements

## Required Skills

We are looking for developers/agencies with strong experience in:

* Agentic AI systems
* LLM applications
* AI workflow automation
* Predictive analytics
* Machine learning
* Real estate technology
* API integrations
* Web scraping
* Full-stack development
* Cloud deployment
* Database architecture

---

# Preferred Technologies

## AI & ML

* LLM integrations
* Multi-agent frameworks
* Python
* Machine learning frameworks

## Backend

* FastAPI
* Django
* Node.js
* PostgreSQL
* MongoDB
* Redis

## Frontend

* React
* Next.js
* Tailwind

## Infrastructure

* Cloud deployment
* Docker
* Kubernetes
* CI/CD pipelines

---

# Deliverables

The selected freelancer/team will deliver:

1. Fully functional Agentic AI system
2. Data ingestion pipelines
3. Predictive analytics engine
4. Lead capture automation system
5. Dashboard UI
6. AI assistant/chatbot
7. Documentation
8. Deployment setup
9. Source code ownership transfer
10. Testing and QA
11. Security implementation

---

# Performance Expectations

The system should:

* Handle large real estate datasets
* Operate reliably at scale
* Generate accurate predictions
* Minimize hallucinations/errors
* Support future expansion
* Be modular and maintainable
* Provide fast response times

---

# Security & Compliance

Experience with:

* Data privacy
* Secure API architecture
* Authentication systems
* Role-based access
* Encryption standards
* Compliance best practices

is highly preferred.

---

# Ideal Candidate

We prefer candidates who:

* Have built AI agent systems before
* Have real estate technology experience
* Understand predictive analytics
* Have strong communication skills
* Can work long-term
* Can suggest architecture improvements
* Can build scalable production-ready systems

---

# To Apply

Please include:

1. Relevant AI/Agentic AI projects
2. Real estate-related experience
3. Tech stack recommendations
4. Estimated timeline
5. Team structure (if agency)
6. Portfolio examples
7. Your proposed architecture approach
8. Examples of predictive analytics systems you have built

---

# Project Type

* Fixed Price
* Long-term opportunity
* Potential for ongoing maintenance and upgrades

---

# Budget

Open for discussion based on experience and proposed solution quality.

---

# Preferred Start

Immediate start preferred.

---

# Additional Notes

We are looking for someone who can think strategically and help architect a high-quality AI product — not just basic automation.

If you have experience building autonomous AI systems, predictive models, lead generation systems, and scalable SaaS platforms, we would like to hear from you.

title: URGENT: Online Marketing Expert Needed - 20+ hrs per week/12+ month contract
description:
Hello! :)

I'm seeking a versatile marketing assistant to join my team for 15+ hours per week (minimum). Please ensure you read below before applying to not waste your or our time.

NO AGENCIES OR TEAMS - We are ONLY looking for Individual contributors.

You MUST have STRONG skills in:
1. Figma - you've done alot of graphic design; social media posts, can create interactions all in Figma
2. SEO - have technical SEO skills work, particularly in content (NOT all AI)
3. Email - you must have skills in successful email marketing campaigns and scraping tools; integration, CRMs, split-testing etc
4. Backlink building - no 'paid links', you must be clever enough to create collaborations the result in backlinks etc
5. English - STRONG written and spoken English only

DO NOT EXAGGERATE, we will be testing you and our tests are AI fool proof, you won't be able to fake your way through these tests and get the job.

The role involves a mix of marketing channel tasks - ongoing, weekly marketing tasks etc.

The ideal candidate should be highly skilled in traffic generation tasks: SEO/GEO, Reddit, blog content, and social media management, as the key task for new offers is to help set up offer pages (landing pages) and drive traffic to them (organic traffic), for existing sites it's to grow our traffic.

Your success in this role will be determined by your ability to generate traffic for the projects you're assigned to over a 3-month probation period. After which your hourly rate will increase and your contract will be extended for a further 9-12-month contract. If you perform exceptionally (above traffic targets), you may be offered a % of profit share.

Not essential, but graphic design, branding skills in Figma and Canva, and video editing gives you bonus points.

Bonus points to candidates that have;
- Automation experience in Claude Cowork, n8n, sumopod, APIs etc (also not essential but a bonus)
- Ability to perform web scraping tasks efficiently, email marketing and excellent English (not just AI)

Ideal Skills and Experience:
- Previous experience as a virtual assistant with a heavy marketing focus or in a mid-weight marketing or more senior role
- Strong organizational and multitasking abilities
- Creative flair for design and presentation
- Excellent English communication skills

Ideally looking for candids in Indonesia and/or the Philippines based on similar working hours.

You absolutely MUST be highly organised, have various tools you use to show up on-time to meetings, prepared and maintain and excellent file organsation system as you will be working on multiple projects at once.

You will be:
1. Shortlisted and contacted
2. VIDEO INTERVIEW (essential)
3. Test task assigned (24 hours to deliver)
4. Winner will be given a 90 day probation period
5. After 90 days, 12+ month contract provided.

If you are a proactive and adaptable professional with the skills listed above, I would love to hear from you!

questions.question: What tasks have you performed using Figma?
How have you secured highly relevant, contextual DA80+ backlinks (not just doing lazy 'paid/endorsement' backlinks)?
Which tools do you use to write and optimise blog posts?
What tools have you used for web scraping, list enrichment and cold and warm email campaigns?

title: Web Scraping & Bots Developer | Automation | Selenium | Playwright
description: I’m currently looking for a developer to join our business potentially on a full-time basis to build automation tools. This role will involve bot development, so experience in that area is important.I’d also like to know if you have any experience working with event ticketing platforms such as Ticketmaster. Additionally, are you familiar with tools like Claude Code or other AI-based development tools?That said, even if you don’t have direct experience in these areas but believe you can deliver, I’m open to giving you an opportunity.If you take a look at my Upwork profile, you’ll see that I’ve worked with many freelancers over the years, including more than 20 who have gone on to become top-rated through long-term collaboration with me.One thing that’s very important to me is honesty and trust. I don’t work well with people who are overly focused on money above all else I value reliability and transparency far more, and I’m very good at spotting dishonesty.Please note that the hourly rate for this role is modest, so only apply if you’re fully comfortable with that. Otherwise, it’s unlikely to be a good fit for either of us.

title: Data Pipeline for Municipal Facility Data
description:
Build a data pipeline that aggregates US municipal facility data from federal datasets, state-level published lists, and web sources, then enriches it with additional information. The pipeline should handle data cleaning, transformation, and loading into a database. Experience with data aggregation and enrichment is essential.

Load EPA ECHO Exporter and Clean Watersheds Needs Survey (CWNS 2022) data into Postgres. Join on FRS ID. Filter to a defined subset.
Build scrapers for ~15 state agency websites that publish facility lists (mix of HTML tables and PDFs). Normalize and merge into the main dataset using fuzzy matching on name + address.
Build an LLM extraction loop using the Anthropic API (Claude Haiku). For each unconfirmed facility, run targeted web searches via a search API, fetch top results, and extract structured data fields with confidence scores.
Output: clean Postgres database with provenance (source URLs, extraction dates) on every field.

questions.question: Share a GitHub repo or code sample where you've built a data pipeline that combines multiple sources. What was the hardest part?
Have you used the Anthropic API or OpenAI API for structured data extraction? What approach do you use to enforce schema and handle low-confidence outputs?

How would you fuzzy-match facility records across two datasets where names are inconsistent (e.g., "City of Buffalo WWTP" vs "Buffalo Bird Island Wastewater Treatment Plant")? Walk me through your approach.
What's your approach when a website returns JavaScript-rendered content that requests/BeautifulSoup can't parse?
